programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Peter Gilmore
programme.desc: Star chef Peter Gilmore sets the bottom three contestants a Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: 3 Blue Ducks
programme.desc: Mindy faces professional chef Darren Robertson in an immunity pin challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP1
programme.desc: Heat 1 of Celebrity MasterChef puts three celebrities against each other to win a place in the semi-finals.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP2
programme.desc: Three new celebrities cook off against each other for their chance to be Australia's Celebrity MasterChef.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP3
programme.desc: In Round one they each have to cook their signature dishes, with the winner getting an advantage in round two.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP4
programme.desc: The celebrities compete in this heat for a place in the Semi-Finals.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - A Culinary Journey
programme.desc: The Top 11 MasterChef contestants visit Kauri Cliffs resort in Northland for a MasterClass.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Nose to Tail
programme.desc: The Top 11 contestants face a nose-to-tail challenge in which each must cook a different cut of pork.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Go Protein
programme.desc: Guest chef Eugene Hamilton from Euro restaurant joins MasterChef judges to cook 3 protein-packed main courses.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Baking
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants bake a sponge cake for guest chef Natalie Oldfield.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Baking Bonanza
programme.desc: Guest chef Sean Armstrong from Auckland bakery Loaf joins MasterChef judges to bake three delicious desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Around the World
programme.desc: Guest chef Sergio Maglione from Toto restaurant joins MasterChef judges to cook dishes from around the world.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Dolphin Island
programme.desc: The Top Eight contestants face an invention test at Dolphin Island resort in Fiji.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Cooking With Fire
programme.desc: Guest chef Michel Louws joins MasterChef judges to cook three barbecue dishes at Dolphin Island resort in Fiji.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Tagine
programme.desc: The losing team must identify the 25 ingredients in a North African tagine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 3
programme.desc: Gary and Matt Moran host a MasterClass where they explore raw foods, herbs, and oils.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Biscuits & Invention Test: Mexican
programme.desc: In a Mexican-themed Invention Test Julia chooses a cactus and a prickly pear as the core ingredient.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Maggie Beer
programme.desc: Kath, Andrew and Julia were faced with the task of reproducing Maggie Beer's Upside Down Grape Cake.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - mmunity Challenge: Shaun Presland
programme.desc: Mindy goes up against Sake head chef Shaun Presland in a Raw Food Immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Leftovers
programme.desc: The teams were tasked with creating a three-course fundraising dinner for charity organisation OzHarvest.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Poultry
programme.desc: A Red Team elimination challenge begins with a "name that bird" round.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 4
programme.desc: Gary begins another MasterClass with his recipe for barbecue chicken.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Flavour Matching & Invention Test: Seduction
programme.desc: The mystery box challenge features a number of seemingly disparate ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Salamanca Market
programme.desc: Tasmania Week begins with a four-team Market Stall Challenge, which took place at Salamanca Markets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Fishing For Salmon Challenge & Philippe Leban
programme.desc: The winning team members cook off for the right to compete in an immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Afternoon Tea
programme.desc: Contestants are split into 2 teams and are tasked with hosting afternoon tea for 100 guests.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP18
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Pub Lunch
programme.desc: Nine contestants on the losing team face elimination challenges that include three knockout rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP5
programme.desc: George Negus, Rachael Finch, and Ryan Katich take on the challenges of the MasterChef Kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: Heat 6 - Fuzzy Agolley, Alex Lloyd and Peter Rowsthorn. Lloyd moved on to semi-finals.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP7
programme.desc: The first semi-final consisted of the six semi-finalists competing in an individual Mystery Box challenge

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP8
programme.desc: The celebrities are at the Shangri-La hotel Altitude restaurant, they must prepare and cater to customers.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 5
programme.desc: In a masterclass edition, Gary cooks a succulent roasted pork rack with braised vegetables.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box & Seafood from Around the World with Rick Stein
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box challenge, contestants are given a single egg and asked to make it the hero of their dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Greek Salad
programme.desc: Characters: 0 | Words: 0 Dalvinder, Audra and Andrew are given 3.5 hours to reproduce George's 'Greek Salad'.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP1
programme.desc: Fifty talented home cooks from around the country compete for just 24 MasterChef aprons.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP1
programme.desc: Fifty talented home cooks from around the country compete for just 24 MasterChef aprons.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP2
programme.desc: At the MasterChef kitchen, the Top 24 contestants face a mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP3
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef house then face a fish challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP4
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must replicate a gourmet egg dish created by award-winning Auckland chef Simon Wright.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP5
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face a mystery box challenge in which they must cook one savoury and one sweet dish.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP6
programme.desc: The contestants must reinvent one of three classic dishes – macaroni cheese, roast lamb or trifle.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP7
programme.desc: The contestants face their first team challenge and first full service

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP8
programme.desc: The contestants tackle a ‘heads and tails’ challenge in which they must cook lesser-known cuts of meat.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Top 50: Mystery Box & Adriano Zumba Elimination
programme.desc: The Top 50 contestants arrive on Cockatoo Island for the first day of MasterChef 2011.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Top 50: Part 2
programme.desc: The remaining 45 contestants arrive on Cockatoo Island and meet new regular MasterChef judge, Matt Moran.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Top 50: Part 3
programme.desc: After last night's elimination, contestants cook off for the first 6 spots in the MasterChef Top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Top 50: Part 4
programme.desc: The bottom 10 from yesterday's challenge arrive at the Passenger Wharf to hear what today's challenge is.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Castaway Cook-Off
programme.desc: The final 30 contestants cook with their 5 favourite ingredients to create their ultimate Desert Island Dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 1
programme.desc: The first Masterclass of Season 3 sees Danielle, Jay, Cleo & Seamus visiting Maggie Beer.
